name: x_icp_engagement_rate
definition: Meaningful replies + quote-tweets from ICP accounts / founder posts per week.
target_hint: ≥5 ICP engagements/post during runway; launch thread ≥15 substantive replies in 4h.

name: x_thread_completion_rate
definition: Analytics thread reads completing to tweet 7 / thread starts (if available) or proxy: clicks on tweet 7 link.
target_hint: ≥25% click-through on CTA tweet for dev-tool threads.

name: x_reply_sla_met
definition: % of mentions/replies answered within 2h during H0–H+8 launch window.

name: x_utm_signups
definition: Signups with utm_source=twitter in launch week.
target_hint: Track per thread; 20–200 for 1k–10k follower accounts on strong launch thread.
